description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden bucket with a polygonal, slightly tapered cylindrical body and a wide open top. The bucket features two prominent black metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections, providing structural reinforcement and a classic appearance. A sturdy, angular black metal bail handle is attached to the sides, arching above the rim for easy carrying. The wood staves are vertically aligned, giving the bucket a traditional, hand-crafted look, and the interior is hollow, suitable for holding liquids or small items. The surface of the wood is matte with visible grain, while the metal parts have a slightly smoother, darker finish. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A classic wooden bucket with black metal bands and a sturdy bail handle, featuring a wide open top and a matte wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood staves, and the full arch of the black metal handle.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle upright, highlighting the attachment points and the bucket's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wood surface and both metal bands clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle upright, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops at top and bottom
